properties.value:
🚧 Test-Mode Override

When Active = Y, every email and SMS dispatch is re-routed to the test addresses below, regardless of the per-template recipient resolver. The intended-recipient address is logged and injected into the subject line ([TEST → original@email]) so routing can be verified end-to-end without delivering to real citizens.

Flip Active = N to go live. No plugin rebuild needed; the dispatcher reads this row on every send.

options.label: Y — re-route every send to test addresses below
N — go live; use per-template recipientResolver as authored

properties.label: Test Recipient Email (used when Test Mode Active = Y)
properties.placeholder: where all emails go in test mode

properties.label: Test Recipient Phone (used when Test Mode Active = Y)
properties.placeholder: where all SMS go in test mode

properties.label: Notes (audit trail — who toggled when, and why)
properties.value: Initialised on 2026-05-11. Toggle Active=N when MAFSN authorises production sends.
